import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)
    
    # Direction vectors
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])
    
    # Agent info
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_y = agent_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    norm_x = agent_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)
    
    # Pocket info
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    # holding green ball (tile=3, color=2) — the transformed object
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # holding blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3) — before transformation
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Grid coordinate meshgrid
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    color_ids = state.grid[:, :, 1]
    
    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3)
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (color_ids == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_present = jnp.minimum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    
    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5)
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (color_ids == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_present = jnp.minimum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    
    # Normalized positions of targets
    blue_pyr_y_norm = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x_norm = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    yel_hex_y_norm = yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    yel_hex_x_norm = yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    
    # Relative positions: agent -> blue pyramid
    rel_pyr_dy = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_pyr_dx = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Relative positions: agent -> yellow hex
    rel_hex_dy = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_hex_dx = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Front tile info
    dy_front = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_front = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_front, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_front, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = tile_ids[front_y, front_x].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = color_ids[front_y, front_x].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    
    # Is front tile the blue pyramid?
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (color_ids[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Is front tile adjacent to yellow hex?
    front_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    # Is agent adjacent to yellow hex?
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Doors info (locked=8, closed=9, open=10)
    door_locked_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    door_closed_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    door_open_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(door_locked_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(door_closed_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(door_open_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Nearest door positions
    door_any_mask = door_locked_mask | door_closed_mask
    door_count = jnp.sum(door_any_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * door_any_mask) / jnp.maximum(door_count, 1.0)
    door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * door_any_mask) / jnp.maximum(door_count, 1.0)
    rel_door_dy = (door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_door_dx = (door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    
    # Egocentric local view (5x5 around agent)
    local_tiles = []
    for dy in range(-2, 3):
        for dx in range(-2, 3):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
            t = tile_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
            c = color_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
            local_tiles.append(t)
            local_tiles.append(c)
    local_obs = jnp.stack(local_tiles)  # 50 elements
    
    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0
    
    # Task phase indicators
    phase_pickup = (1.0 - holding_green_ball) * (1.0 - holding_blue_pyramid)  # need to pick up
    phase_place = holding_green_ball  # need to place
    
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([norm_y, norm_x]),                          # 2
        dir_oh,                                                # 4
        jnp.array([pocket_tile, pocket_color, pocket_empty,   # 5
                   holding_green_ball, holding_blue_pyramid]),
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y_norm, blue_pyr_x_norm,          # 5
                   blue_pyr_present, rel_pyr_dy, rel_pyr_dx]),
        jnp.array([dist_pyr]),                                 # 1
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y_norm, yel_hex_x_norm,            # 5
                   yel_hex_present, rel_hex_dy, rel_hex_dx]),
        jnp.array([dist_hex]),                                 # 1
        jnp.array([front_tile_id, front_tile_color,            # 4
                   front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_hex]),
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex]),                            # 1
        jnp.array([rel_door_dy, rel_door_dx,                   # 5
                   n_locked / 4.0, n_closed / 4.0, n_open / 4.0]),
        jnp.array([step_norm]),                                # 1
        jnp.array([phase_pickup, phase_place]),                # 2
        local_obs,                                             # 50
    ])
    
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
